# render-detail

Per-plugin resources section in the plugin detail pane. Contributes a
`PluginView.Section` that reads `node.facets["resources"]` and lists each
`defineResource` with its key, mode, and runtime (server/central).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin resources section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "resources" → `ResourcesDetailSection`
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginNode`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginViewSlots`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.Section`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/text.Text`
